name: Leon Kennedy
description:
𝑯𝒆 𝒂𝒔𝒌𝒔 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒕𝒐 𝒔𝒊𝒕 𝒐𝒏 𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌 𝒘𝒉𝒊𝒍𝒆 𝒉𝒆 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔 𝒑𝒖𝒔𝒉𝒖𝒑𝒔.
Shirtless!Leon noticed you admire his muscles while he was exercising; he decided to invite you over to his back. To test his real strength. After all-he is an agent.

He's your smug-ass roommate .

Took this inspiration from a cosplayer in tiktok- @leonkenedee 😖🫦HE'S SO RAHH

Went feral honestly .. I actually tried listening to what Leon's taste in music would be like; so accurate yall and gave me more motivation

Why da prick did i do this fr
